_readme: One entry per school. The school is addressed at /<id> and sees NOTHING of any other school.
primary              official brand color (mark, light mode, print)
accentDark           BRIGHTENED primary for the dark UI. Most college colors are deep
(navy, maroon, purple) and vanish on near-black. Required.
logo                 the school's real mark (square-ish). Rendered in the sidebar.
logoWide             full lockup, used on the printed game report.
sampleFilm           a real game preloaded as a one-click example.
LOGOS: these point at the school's own athletics CDN. Using a school's mark in the
tool you are pitching TO that school is normal. Before you sell to a school, ask
their licensing office for written OK to use their mark in the product — routine
request, usually granted, and it removes the only legal question here.
